title: Rurgavean Sleight
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Rurgavean Sleight''' was a tactic [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] thought [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was using against him shortly before the [[Swarm War]] started.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
